chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.S - 99 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.347/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 26-5-2025 M/s Ghulam Mohayaddin Jatt and Athar Hussain Abro, Advocates for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through the instant petition, the petitioner submits that the private respondents be restrained from causing any harassment to him and his family members, and that the official respondents be directed to provide adequate protection to the petitioner and his family. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, learned Assistant Advocate General, who is present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice of this petition and submits that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. In view of the above statement made by the learned Assistant Advocate General, the learned counsel for the petitioner expresses satisfaction and seeks disposal of the instant petition with a direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner and his family strictly in accordance with law. In view of the foregoing, the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioner as and when required, strictly in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be communicated to AAG Office as well as to the Senior Superintendent of Police, Naushahro Feroze, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms, along with listed application. JUDGE Naveed Ali
